subjects.name: 红一方面军
subjects.leader: 毛泽东、周恩来、朱德、张闻天、王稼祥、彭德怀等
subjects.description: 中央红军主力。1934年10月从中央苏区战略转移，1935年10月到达陕北。
subjects.nameEn: Red First Front Army / Central Red Army
subjects.leaderEn: Mao Zedong, Zhou Enlai, Zhu De, Zhang Wentian, Wang Jiaxiang, Peng Dehuai, Lin Biao, etc.
subjects.descriptionEn: Main column of the Central Red Army, departing from the Central Soviet Area in October 1934 and reaching northern Shaanxi in October 1935.
subjects.subUnits: 红一军团; 红三军团; 红五军团; 红八军团; 红九军团; 中央军委纵队; 红三十四师
subjects.subUnitsEn: 1st Corps; 3rd Corps; 5th Corps; 8th Corps; 9th Corps; Central Military Commission Column; 34th Division

subjects.name: 红二十五军
subjects.leader: 程子华、吴焕先、徐海东等
subjects.description: 鄂豫皖根据地重要力量，1934年11月从河南罗山何家冲出发，最早到达陕北。
subjects.leaderEn: Cheng Zihua, Wu Huanxian, Xu Haidong, etc.
subjects.descriptionEn: A force from the Hubei-Henan-Anhui base area, among the earliest Red Army columns to reach northern Shaanxi.
subjects.subUnits: 红二十五军第七十三师; 红二十五军第七十四师; 红二十五军第七十五师; 北上抗日第二先遣队
subjects.subUnitsEn: 73rd Division; 74th Division; 75th Division; Second Northern Anti-Japanese Advance Detachment

subjects.name: 红四方面军
subjects.leader: 徐向前、陈昌浩、张国焘、李先念等
subjects.description: 由川陕根据地转移，经历嘉陵江战役、懋功会师、南下挫折、甘孜会师，1936年10月与红一方面军会宁会师。
subjects.leaderEn: Xu Xiangqian, Chen Changhao, Zhang Guotao, Li Xiannian, etc.
subjects.descriptionEn: A major Red Army force from the Sichuan-Shaanxi base area, later converging with the First and Second Front Armies.
subjects.subUnits: 红四军; 红九军; 红三十军; 红三十一军; 红三十三军; 妇女独立团
subjects.subUnitsEn: 4th Corps; 9th Corps; 30th Corps; 31st Corps; 33rd Corps; Women's Independent Regiment

subjects.name: 红二方面军
subjects.leader: 贺龙、任弼时、萧克、关向应、刘伯承等
subjects.description: 1935年11月从湘鄂川黔根据地出发，1936年7月正式组成红二方面军，10月到达将台堡。
subjects.leaderEn: He Long, Ren Bishi, Guan Xiangying, Xiao Ke, Wang Zhen, etc.
subjects.descriptionEn: The Second and Sixth Corps departed from Sangzhi in 1935 and were later reorganized as the Second Front Army.
subjects.subUnits: 红二军团; 红六军团; 红三十二军; 红十八师; 红十六师

subjects.name: 陕甘红军
subjects.leader: 刘志丹、谢子长、习仲勋、徐海东等
subjects.description: 陕甘边、陕北根据地革命武装，为中央和各路红军长征提供落脚点。
subjects.nameEn: Shaanxi-Gansu Red Army and revolutionary base
subjects.leaderEn: Liu Zhidan, Xie Zichang, Xi Zhongxun, Gao Gang, etc.
subjects.descriptionEn: The northwestern revolutionary base that became the landing point for the Long March.
subjects.subUnits: 红二十六军; 红二十七军; 红二十八军; 红十五军团; 陕北游击队; 陕甘边游击队
subjects.subUnitsEn: 26th Army; 27th Army; 28th Army; 15th Corps; Northern Shaanxi guerrillas; Shaanxi-Gansu border guerrillas

subjects.leaderEn: Chiang Kai-shek, Xue Yue, He Jian, Long Yun, Hu Zongnan and related forces
subjects.descriptionEn: A schematic grey layer showing pursuit, blockade, encirclement and pressure against Red Army routes; not a precise deployment map.
subjects.subUnits: 中央军; 湘军; 桂军; 滇军; 黔军; 川军; 西北军; 马家军
subjects.subUnitsEn: Central Army; Hunan troops; Guangxi troops; Yunnan troops; Guizhou troops; Sichuan troops; Northwest Army; Ma clique forces

events.title: 第五次“围剿”后敌军压迫中央苏区
events.description: 中央苏区第五次反“围剿”失利后，国民党军继续压迫和封锁中央苏区，中央红军被迫实行战略转移。
events.titleEn: Enemy pressure around the Central Soviet Area after the fifth encirclement campaign
events.descriptionEn: After the failure of the fifth counter-encirclement campaign, Nationalist forces kept pressing and blockading the Central Soviet Area, forcing strategic transfer.

events.title: 中央红军主力开始战略转移
events.description: 中共中央、中革军委率中央红军主力从中央苏区出发，开始战略转移。数据以瑞金、于都一带作为可视化起点，实际出发涉及多地集结与渡河。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Start at 江西瑞金/于都一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a start event on the Red First Front Army route near 江西瑞金/于都一带 (19341010).

events.title: 中央红军渡过于都河
events.description: 中央红军从于都等地夜渡于都河，离开中央苏区腹地。此点用于把起点从政治中心推进到实际行军路线。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: River crossing at 江西于都
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a river crossing event on the Red First Front Army route near 江西于都 (19341017).

events.title: 突破第一道封锁线
events.description: 中央红军离开中央苏区后，先后突破敌军数道封锁线，继续向湘粤桂边界推进。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Breakthrough at 赣南安远/信丰一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a breakthrough event on the Red First Front Army route near 赣南安远/信丰一带 (19341021).

events.title: 南梁革命根据地建设推进
events.description: 陕甘边革命根据地以南梁为中心逐步发展，为后续陕甘、陕北革命根据地联结奠定基础。此类节点用于说明长征最终落脚点并非凭空出现，而是由西北红军长期开拓形成。
events.titleEn: Shaan-Gan: Base building at 甘肃华池南梁
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a base building event on the Shaan-Gan route near 甘肃华池南梁 (19341107).

events.title: 连续突破第三道封锁线
events.description: 中央红军向湘江方向推进，连续突破敌军封锁，但部队在持续追击与堵截中消耗加重。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Breakthrough at 湘南宜章/临武一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a breakthrough event on the Red First Front Army route near 湘南宜章/临武一带 (19341115).

events.title: 红二十五军从何家冲开始长征
events.description: 红二十五军高举北上抗日第二先遣队旗帜，从河南罗山何家冲出发，开始战略转移。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Start at 河南罗山何家冲
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a start event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 河南罗山何家冲 (19341116).

events.title: 红二十五军独树镇战斗
events.description: 红二十五军在河南方城独树镇七里岗附近遭优势敌军包围，27日冲出包围，保存有生力量。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Battle at 河南方城独树镇
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 河南方城独树镇 (19341126).

events.title: 湘江一线形成多重封锁
events.description: 敌军在湘江沿线形成严密封锁，试图截断中央红军西进通道，湘江战役由此成为长征初期最惨烈的战役之一。
events.titleEn: Multiple blockade lines form along the Xiang River
events.descriptionEn: Enemy forces formed dense blockades along the Xiang River, attempting to cut off the westward movement of the Central Red Army.

events.title: 湘江战役开始
events.description: 中央红军突破第四道封锁线，在湘江两岸付出重大代价。渡过湘江后，中央红军由出发时8.6万余人锐减至3万余人。

location.name: 广西兴安/全州湘江一线

events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Campaign at 广西兴安/全州湘江一线
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red First Front Army route near 广西兴安/全州湘江一线 (19341127).
events.casualties: 湘江战役后中央红军由8万余人锐减至约3万余人，损失极为惨重。

events.title: 红三十四师等部血战湘江，掩护主力突围
events.description: 湘江战役中，红五军团第34师和红三军团第18团等部担负掩护任务，与数倍敌军苦战，大部壮烈牺牲。
events.titleEn: The 34th Division fights at the Xiang River to cover the main force
events.descriptionEn: During the Xiang River Campaign, the 34th Division and related covering units fought against overwhelming enemy forces, suffering devastating losses while protecting the main column.
events.casualties: 红三十四师等部大部牺牲

events.title: 越过五岭余脉，湘江突围后继续西进
events.description: 湘江战役后，中央红军在五岭山地间艰难西进。山川阻隔与敌军追堵交织，长征的艰难在此集中展开。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Hardship at 桂北越城岭一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a hardship event on the Red First Front Army route near 桂北越城岭一带 (19341201).

poem.title: 五岭并非细浪
poem.text: 五岭山地横亘南方，行军并不轻松。诗句把连绵山脉写成“细浪”，显出红军面对万水千山的气魄。

events.title: 陈树湘壮烈牺牲，红三十四师成为“绝命后卫”
events.description: 红三十四师师长陈树湘在湘江突围后负伤被俘，最终壮烈牺牲。“为苏维埃流尽最后一滴血”的事迹成为长征壮烈精神的重要象征。
events.titleEn: Chen Shuxiang dies after the Xiang River breakout
events.descriptionEn: Chen Shuxiang, commander of the 34th Division, was wounded and captured after the Xiang River breakout and died heroically, becoming a symbol of sacrifice on the Long March.

events.title: 红二十五军越过伏牛山，转入豫陕边
events.description: 独树镇突围后，红二十五军向伏牛山、豫陕边转进，开始在鄂豫陕边创建新的活动空间。
events.titleEn: The 25th Red Army crosses the Funiu Mountains toward the Henan-Shaanxi border
events.descriptionEn: After breaking through at Dushuzhen, the 25th Red Army moved into the Funiu Mountains and the Henan-Shaanxi border region.

events.title: 红二十五军庾家河会议后转入鄂豫陕
events.description: 红二十五军在转战中调整战略方向，推动创建鄂豫陕根据地，并继续承担北上抗日先遣队角色。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Meeting at 陕西商洛庾家河
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 陕西商洛庾家河 (19341210).

events.title: 通道会议调整进军方向
events.description: 中央红军在湘桂黔边境转向贵州方向，避免继续按原计划与敌重兵相撞。此节点作为遵义会议前军事路线调整的铺垫。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Meeting at 湖南通道
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red First Front Army route near 湖南通道 (19341212).

events.title: 黎平会议决定向黔北进军
events.description: 中央政治局在黎平召开会议，采纳向黔北进军的主张，为后续占领遵义和召开遵义会议创造条件。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Meeting at 贵州黎平
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州黎平 (19341218).

events.title: 猴场会议限制军事指挥权集中于少数人
events.description: 猴场会议要求重大军事行动须经中央政治局讨论，为遵义会议前进一步纠正错误指挥创造条件。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Meeting at 贵州瓮安猴场
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州瓮安猴场 (19350101).

events.title: 中央红军占领遵义
events.description: 中央红军进入遵义，为召开具有转折意义的遵义会议创造条件。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Arrival at 贵州遵义
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a arrival event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州遵义 (19350107).

events.title: 敌军向黔北追堵，遵义周边压力上升
events.description: 中央红军进入黔北后，敌军继续向遵义周边压迫。军事危局与路线调整共同构成遵义会议的背景。
events.titleEn: Enemy pressure rises around Zunyi
events.descriptionEn: After the Central Red Army entered northern Guizhou, enemy pressure continued around Zunyi, forming the military context of the Zunyi Meeting.

events.title: 红二十五军开辟鄂豫陕根据地
events.description: 红二十五军进入鄂豫陕边后，依托山地与群众工作创建新的游击根据地，形成“星星之火”式的支线铺开。
events.titleEn: The 25th Red Army develops the Hubei-Henan-Shaanxi base area
events.descriptionEn: In the border region, the 25th Red Army developed a new guerrilla base through mountain warfare and mass work.

events.title: 遵义会议召开
events.description: 中共中央政治局在遵义召开扩大会议，集中解决军事和组织问题，结束王明“左”倾教条主义在中共中央的统治，确立毛泽东在党和红军中的领导地位。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Meeting at 贵州遵义
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州遵义 (19350115).

events.title: 土城战斗后调整渡江计划
events.description: 土城战斗未能达到预期，中央红军随即调整行动，转而西渡赤水，拉开四渡赤水机动作战序幕。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Battle at 贵州习水土城
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州习水土城 (19350128).

events.title: 一渡赤水，转入川南
events.description: 中央红军在土城战斗后西渡赤水，开启四渡赤水机动作战。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Campaign at 贵州土城/赤水河
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州土城/赤水河 (19350129).

events.title: 蔡玉窑战斗重创追敌
events.description: 春节前后，红二十五军在陕南连续作战，为创建鄂豫陕根据地打开局面。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Battle at 陕西柞水蔡玉窑一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 陕西柞水蔡玉窑一带 (19350131).

events.title: 川黔敌军围堵赤水河流域
events.description: 中央红军一渡赤水后，国民党军调集多路部队试图在川黔边界围堵红军。
events.titleEn: KMT forces: Pursuit at 川黔赤水河流域
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a pursuit event on the KMT forces route near 川黔赤水河流域 (19350201).

events.title: 贺子珍川南生女并含泪托孤
events.description: 中央红军转战川南古蔺一带时，贺子珍生下一名女婴。因部队急行军和敌情紧迫，孩子被寄养当地群众家中，个体命运折射长征的人间苦难。
events.titleEn: He Zizhen gives birth in southern Sichuan and entrusts the child to locals
events.descriptionEn: In the Gulin area of southern Sichuan, He Zizhen gave birth during the march. Under urgent military pressure, the infant was entrusted to local people, reflecting the human suffering behind the campaign.

events.title: 文公岭战斗奠定陕南根据地基础
events.description: 红二十五军在文公岭一带打击陕军，为建立第二块革命根据地创造条件。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Battle at 陕西蓝田文公岭一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 陕西蓝田文公岭一带 (19350205).
events.result: 重创陕军第126旅相关部队

events.title: 扎西会议继续调整中央领导与军事部署
events.description: 遵义会议后，中央红军向川滇黔边转进，在扎西一带继续讨论组织分工、军事行动和根据地问题，推动遵义会议精神落实。
events.titleEn: The Zhaxi meetings continue organizational and military adjustments
events.descriptionEn: After the Zunyi Meeting, the Central Red Army moved through the Sichuan-Yunnan-Guizhou border area; meetings near Zhaxi continued the adjustment of leadership and military deployment.

events.title: 陕甘边与陕北革命根据地统一为陕甘革命根据地
events.description: 陕甘边革命根据地与陕北革命根据地统一为陕甘革命根据地，又称西北革命根据地，成为土地革命战争后期保存较完整的重要根据地。
events.titleEn: Shaan-Gan: Base building at 陕甘边/陕北根据地
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a base building event on the Shaan-Gan route near 陕甘边/陕北根据地 (19350215).

events.title: 二渡赤水，回师黔北
events.description: 中央红军由太平渡、二郎滩等地二渡赤水，回师黔北，寻机打击敌军。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Campaign at 贵州习水太平渡
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州习水太平渡 (19350218).

events.title: 娄山关战斗与遵义大捷
events.description: 中央红军夺取娄山关并再克遵义，是长征以来一次重要胜利，提振士气。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Battle at 贵州娄山关
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州娄山关 (19350225).

events.title: 邓萍在遵义城下侦察敌情时牺牲
events.description: 红三军团参谋长邓萍在遵义战役前线侦察敌情时中弹牺牲，是长征途中牺牲的红军高级指挥员之一。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Sacrifice at 贵州遵义老城
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a sacrifice event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州遵义老城 (19350227).

events.title: 苟坝会议围绕作战方针展开争论
events.description: 中央红军在遵义以南苟坝一带召开会议，围绕是否进攻打鼓新场等问题展开争论。该节点用于表现长征中的军事决策并非线性推进，而是在危局中反复权衡。
events.titleEn: The Gouba Meeting debates operational direction
events.descriptionEn: Near Gouba south of Zunyi, Red Army leaders debated operational choices under urgent military pressure, showing how decisions were repeatedly weighed amid crisis.

events.title: 三渡赤水，西进川南
events.description: 中央红军由茅台及其附近三渡赤水，再次造成敌军判断混乱。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Campaign at 贵州茅台
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州茅台 (19350316).

events.title: 赤水河两岸敌军重兵围堵
events.description: 四渡赤水期间，中央红军在川黔滇边敌军重兵之间穿插机动，以不规则转进打乱围堵部署。
events.titleEn: Enemy forces attempt encirclement along the Chishui River
events.descriptionEn: During the Four Crossings of the Chishui, the Central Red Army maneuvered through heavy enemy pressure in the Sichuan-Guizhou-Yunnan border region.

events.title: 四渡赤水，跳出重围
events.description: 中央红军四渡赤水，佯动与机动结合，摆脱敌军围追堵截。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Campaign at 贵州二郎滩
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州二郎滩 (19350321).

events.title: 红四方面军强渡嘉陵江
events.description: 红四方面军发起嘉陵江战役，突破嘉陵江防线。以此作为红四方面军战略转移的可视化起点；另有口径将放弃川陕苏区后的5月初作为长征起点。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Campaign at 四川苍溪嘉陵江
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川苍溪嘉陵江 (19350328).

events.title: 南渡乌江，佯逼贵阳
events.description: 中央红军南渡乌江并向贵阳方向运动，调动敌军，为西进云南、北渡金沙江创造条件。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: River crossing at 贵州乌江一线
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a river crossing event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州乌江一线 (19350329).

events.title: 佯逼贵阳，调动敌军
events.description: 中央红军南渡乌江后佯逼贵阳，迫使敌军调动，为随后西进云南、巧渡金沙江创造条件。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: March at 贵州贵阳周边
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red First Front Army route near 贵州贵阳周边 (19350331).

events.title: 兵临昆明，迫使敌军回援
events.description: 中央红军向昆明方向急进，制造威胁，调动云南方向敌军，为北渡金沙江赢得时间。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: March at 云南昆明周边
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red First Front Army route near 云南昆明周边 (19350409).

events.title: 红二十五军在华阳一带开展群众工作
events.description: 红二十五军在秦岭南麓与陕南地区活动，通过宣传抗日、发动群众和扩充队伍，推动鄂豫陕根据地继续发展。
events.titleEn: The 25th Red Army carries out mass work near Huayang
events.descriptionEn: Near Huayang in southern Shaanxi, the 25th Red Army promoted anti-Japanese propaganda, mobilized local people and expanded its forces.

events.title: 嘉陵江战役结束，红四方面军控制大片区域
events.description: 红四方面军强渡嘉陵江后，历时二十余日作战，向川甘边推进并控制大片地区，为后续西进与会师创造条件。
events.titleEn: The Jialing River Campaign ends with the Fourth Front Army pushing west
events.descriptionEn: After crossing the Jialing River, the Fourth Front Army fought for more than twenty days and pushed toward the Sichuan-Gansu border.

events.title: 云南方向试图封锁金沙江渡口
events.description: 中央红军逼近金沙江时，敌军试图依托江防和地方部队封锁渡口。红军快速机动抢占渡口，跳出包围圈。
events.titleEn: Enemy forces attempt to block Jinsha River crossings
events.descriptionEn: As the Red Army approached the Jinsha River, enemy forces tried to block the ferries, but rapid maneuver secured crossing points.

events.title: 巧渡金沙江开始
events.description: 中央红军抢占金沙江渡口，准备利用少量船只渡江，摆脱南岸追兵。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: River crossing at 云南禄劝皎平渡
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a river crossing event on the Red First Front Army route near 云南禄劝皎平渡 (19350429).

poem.title: 金沙江的“暖”
poem.text: 在皎平渡一带渡过金沙江后，中央红军甩开追敌，获得战略主动。诗句中的“暖”，指向绝处逢生后的舒展与希望。

events.title: 红四方面军离开川陕根据地向西转移
events.description: 红四方面军在嘉陵江战役后继续向川西北转移，与中央红军会合。该节点用于补足红四方面军从嘉陵江向懋功的路线段。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: March at 四川广元/剑阁一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川广元/剑阁一带 (19350501).

events.title: 中央红军主力渡过金沙江
events.description: 1935年5月3日至9日，中央红军仅凭少量渡船连续渡过金沙江，摆脱敌军重兵围追堵截。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: River crossing at 云南皎平渡
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a river crossing event on the Red First Front Army route near 云南皎平渡 (19350503).

poem.title: 金沙江的“暖”
poem.text: 在皎平渡一带渡过金沙江后，中央红军甩开追敌，获得战略主动。诗句中的“暖”，指向绝处逢生后的舒展与希望。

events.title: 鄂豫陕根据地初步形成四块区域
events.description: 至1935年5月初，红二十五军在三省边界地区建立多块根据地，红军长征在途中播撒新的革命火种。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Base building at 鄂豫陕边区商洛一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a base building event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 鄂豫陕边区商洛一带 (19350505).

events.title: 会理会议总结机动作战经验
events.description: 中央红军渡过金沙江后在会理一带召开会议，总结渡江与机动作战经验，统一认识，准备继续北上。
events.titleEn: The Huili Meeting reviews mobile warfare after the Jinsha crossing
events.descriptionEn: After crossing the Jinsha River, leaders met around Huili to review mobile warfare and prepare for the northward march.

events.title: 刘伯承与小叶丹彝海结盟
events.description: 中央红军进入凉山彝族地区后，严格执行民族纪律。刘伯承与彝族果基部落首领小叶丹在彝海边按彝族习俗歃血为盟，小叶丹派向导带路，帮助红军顺利通过彝族地区。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Alliance at 四川冕宁彝海
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a alliance event on the Red First Front Army route near 四川冕宁彝海 (19350522).

events.title: 土门战役胜利，打破北川河谷封锁
events.description: 红四方面军发动土门战役，打破敌军固守北川河谷的企图，向岷江上游推进。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Campaign at 四川北川土门一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川北川土门一带 (19350522).

events.title: 强渡大渡河
events.description: 刘伯承、聂荣臻等指挥先遣部队在安顺场强渡大渡河，为红军北上打开通道。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Battle at 四川石棉安顺场
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red First Front Army route near 四川石棉安顺场 (19350525).

events.title: 大渡河一线敌军封锁与追击
events.description: 红军逼近大渡河、泸定桥时，敌军试图借天险阻截。强渡大渡河和飞夺泸定桥成为突破天险封锁的关键节点。

location.name: 四川安顺场—泸定桥一线

events.titleEn: Enemy blockade along the Dadu River line
events.descriptionEn: Enemy forces tried to use the Dadu River and Luding Bridge as natural barriers; the Red Army broke through by forced crossing and assault.

events.title: 飞夺泸定桥
events.description: 红四团22名勇士冒着火力攀爬铁索，夺取泸定桥，保障红军主力渡过大渡河。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Battle at 四川泸定桥
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red First Front Army route near 四川泸定桥 (19350529).

poem.title: 铁索桥上的寒光
poem.text: 泸定桥横跨大渡河，铁索凌空、枪火交织。诗中的“寒”，凝聚了天险、火线与牺牲。

events.title: 中央红军翻越夹金山
events.description: 中央红军翻越长征中的第一座大雪山夹金山，行军进入川西北高寒地区。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Hardship at 四川宝兴夹金山
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a hardship event on the Red First Front Army route near 四川宝兴夹金山 (19350602).

events.title: 红一、红四方面军前锋在达维会师
events.description: 红一、红四方面军前锋部队在懋功东南的达维地区会师，形成长征途中的重要会师节点。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Convergence at 四川小金达维
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red First Front Army route near 四川小金达维 (19350612).

events.title: 红四方面军与中央红军达维会师
events.description: 红四方面军前锋与中央红军在达维会师。该事件作为红四方面军路线独立连线终点之一，避免与中央红军路线混连。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Convergence at 四川小金达维
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川小金达维 (19350612).

events.title: 紫荆关战斗突破敌军围攻
events.description: 红二十五军在第二次反“围剿”中机动作战，取得紫荆关战斗胜利。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Battle at 陕西山阳紫荆关一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 陕西山阳紫荆关一带 (19350616).

events.title: 中央红军主力到达懋功地区
events.description: 中共中央、中革军委和红一方面军主力到达懋功地区，红一、红四两支主力会合。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Convergence at 四川懋功/小金
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red First Front Army route near 四川懋功/小金 (19350618).

events.title: 两河口会议确定北上方针
events.description: 中共中央政治局召开两河口会议，确定北上建立川陕甘根据地的战略方针。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Meeting at 四川小金两河口
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red First Front Army route near 四川小金两河口 (19350626).

events.title: 两河口会议明确共同北上方针
events.description: 红一、红四方面军会合后召开两河口会议，确定集中主力向北发展、创建川陕甘根据地的方针。
events.titleEn: The Lianghekou Meeting affirms the northward strategy
events.descriptionEn: After the First and Fourth Front Armies met, the Lianghekou Meeting affirmed the strategy of moving north to create a Sichuan-Shaanxi-Gansu base.

events.title: 敌军三十多个团围攻鄂豫陕根据地
events.description: 红二十五军创建的鄂豫陕根据地遭敌军重兵围攻，红军以运动战和游击战各个击破。
events.titleEn: KMT forces: Encirclement at 鄂豫陕边区
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a encirclement event on the KMT forces route near 鄂豫陕边区 (19350701).

events.title: 袁家沟口战斗歼灭陕军警备第一旅
events.description: 红二十五军诱敌深入，在袁家沟口突然发起攻击，全歼陕军警备第一旅，成为其长征中俘敌数量最多的一次战斗。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Campaign at 陕西山阳袁家沟口
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 陕西山阳袁家沟口 (19350702).

events.title: 北出终南山，威逼西安
events.description: 红二十五军北出终南山，前锋直抵西安以南，牵动敌军部署并打破第二次“围剿”。

location.name: 陕西西安南郊韦曲/子午镇

events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: March at 陕西西安南郊韦曲/子午镇
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 陕西西安南郊韦曲/子午镇 (19350713).

events.title: 红二十五军从沣峪口西征北上
events.description: 红二十五军决定西征甘肃、北上陕北，赴陕甘苏区与红二十六军会合，配合中央红军北上。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: March at 陕西长安沣峪口
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 陕西长安沣峪口 (19350716).

events.title: 沙窝会议部署红一、红四方面军混编北上
events.description: 红一、红四方面军会合后，中央在沙窝一带继续讨论北上方针和部队编组，长征进入雪山草地与内部路线分歧交织的新阶段。
events.titleEn: The Shawo Meeting discusses northward movement and reorganization
events.descriptionEn: After the meeting of the First and Fourth Front Armies, discussions near Shawo addressed the northward strategy and force organization.

events.title: 毛儿盖会议继续讨论北上与草地行动
events.description: 在雪山草地前后，红一、红四方面军围绕北上路线、草地行军和部队部署继续讨论，路线分歧逐步加深。
events.titleEn: The Maoergai discussions address the northward route and grassland march
events.descriptionEn: Before and around the grassland crossings, leaders continued to debate the northward route and deployment.

events.title: 红二十五军泾川一带遭遇激战
events.description: 红二十五军西征北上途中在甘肃泾川一带与敌军激战，继续向陕甘根据地方向推进。
events.titleEn: The 25th Red Army fights near Jingchuan
events.descriptionEn: During its northwestern movement, the 25th Red Army fought near Jingchuan and continued toward the Shaanxi-Gansu base area.

events.title: 攻克隆德后向泾川推进
events.description: 红二十五军攻克隆德后继续向泾川方向机动，在敌军重压下寻找北上通道。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Battle at 宁夏隆德
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 宁夏隆德 (19350817).

events.title: 毛儿盖会议继续确定北上路线
events.description: 中共中央在川西北继续围绕北上战略展开部署，随后右路军进入草地。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Meeting at 四川松潘毛儿盖
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red First Front Army route near 四川松潘毛儿盖 (19350820).

events.title: 吴焕先在泾川战斗中牺牲
events.description: 红二十五军政治委员吴焕先在甘肃泾川四坡村附近战斗中牺牲。人物牺牲节点用于补充长征的个体代价。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Sacrifice at 甘肃泾川四坡村
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a sacrifice event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 甘肃泾川四坡村 (19350821).

events.title: 右路军开始过草地
events.description: 中央红军右路军进入若尔盖草地，面对缺粮、沼泽、高寒等极端困难。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Hardship at 四川若尔盖草地
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a hardship event on the Red First Front Army route near 四川若尔盖草地 (19350821).

events.title: 川西北敌军压迫红军草地行动
events.description: 雪山草地阶段，自然险阻与敌军压迫叠加，部队在饥饿、寒冷和追堵压力中继续北进。
events.titleEn: Enemy pressure accompanies the grassland crossing
events.descriptionEn: During the snow-mountain and grassland phase, natural hazards and enemy pressure overlapped.

events.title: 包座战斗打开北上通道
events.description: 右路军走出草地后，在包座一带作战，打开继续北上的通道，使穿越草地后的部队获得喘息与前进条件。
events.titleEn: The Baozuo Battle opens the route north
events.descriptionEn: After crossing the grasslands, the right column fought near Baozuo and opened the route for continued movement northward.

events.title: 包座方向配合打开北上道路
events.description: 红一、红四方面军相关部队在包座方向作战，打开继续北上的道路。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Battle at 四川若尔盖包座
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川若尔盖包座 (19350829).

events.title: 巴西会议后红一方面军单独北上
events.description: 张国焘拒绝执行北上方针并率部南下后，中共中央在巴西一带作出继续北上的决定，红一方面军独自向陕甘方向推进。
events.titleEn: After the Baxi discussions, the First Front Army continues north alone
events.descriptionEn: After Zhang Guotao rejected the northward line, the central leadership around Baxi decided to continue north toward the Shaanxi-Gansu area.

events.title: 俄界会议决定继续北上
events.description: 中共中央在俄界召开会议，批判分裂活动，决定率陕甘支队继续北上。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Meeting at 甘肃迭部俄界
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red First Front Army route near 甘肃迭部俄界 (19350912).

events.title: 红二十五军到达陕北永坪
events.description: 红二十五军辗转到达陕北延川永坪镇，成为到达陕北较早的一支长征队伍。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Arrival at 陕西延川永坪
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a arrival event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 陕西延川永坪 (19350915).

events.title: 红二十五军与陕甘红军永坪会师
events.description: 红二十五军与红二十六军、红二十七军在永坪举行会师庆祝活动。两军会师后合编为红十五军团，徐海东任军团长，刘志丹任副军团长。
events.titleEn: Red Twenty-Fifth Army: Convergence at 陕西延川永坪
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red Twenty-Fifth Army route near 陕西延川永坪 (19350916).

events.title: 突破腊子口
events.description: 红军攻克天险腊子口，打开北上甘南通道。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Battle at 甘肃迭部腊子口
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red First Front Army route near 甘肃迭部腊子口 (19350917).

events.title: 陕甘红军迎接红二十五军
events.description: 陕甘红军与红二十五军在永坪会师，增强了西北革命根据地军事力量，也为迎接中央红军北上创造条件。
events.titleEn: Shaan-Gan: Convergence at 陕西延川永坪
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Shaan-Gan route near 陕西延川永坪 (19350918).

events.title: 红十五军团成立，西北红军力量增强
events.description: 红二十五军与陕甘红军会师后，合编为红十五军团，陕北根据地的正规红军力量显著增强，也为中央红军抵达提供了更坚实的军事依托。
events.titleEn: The 15th Red Army Corps is formed after the Yongping convergence
events.descriptionEn: After the 25th Red Army met the Shaanxi-Gansu Red Army, the 15th Red Army Corps was formed, strengthening the northern Shaanxi base.

events.title: 哈达铺决定前往陕北
events.description: 中央红军在哈达铺获得陕北红军和根据地信息，决定向陕北进军，使长征落脚点进一步明确。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Decision at 甘肃宕昌哈达铺
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a decision event on the Red First Front Army route near 甘肃宕昌哈达铺 (19350920).

events.title: 翻越岷山余脉，望见陕甘方向
events.description: 突破腊子口后，中央红军继续翻越岷山余脉，向陕甘革命根据地靠近。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Snow mountain crossing at 甘肃岷山/哈达铺以北
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a snow mountain crossing event on the Red First Front Army route near 甘肃岷山/哈达铺以北 (19350923).

poem.title: 翻过雪山后的喜悦
poem.text: 岷山的雪不是浪漫景色，而是饥寒、疲惫与生死考验。越过岷山，陕北方向逐渐清晰，长征进入胜利前夜。

events.title: 榜罗镇会议最终确定落脚陕北
events.description: 中央政治局在榜罗镇召开会议，进一步明确到陕北与陕甘红军会合的战略方向。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Meeting at 甘肃通渭榜罗镇
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red First Front Army route near 甘肃通渭榜罗镇 (19350927).

events.title: 红十五军团组织劳山战役
events.description: 红二十五军与陕甘红军合编后，在刘志丹、徐海东等指挥下组织劳山战役，打击敌军“围剿”，为迎接中央红军创造有利条件。
events.titleEn: Shaan-Gan: Campaign at 陕西甘泉劳山
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Shaan-Gan route near 陕西甘泉劳山 (19351001).

events.title: 卓木碉会议与张国焘另立“中央”
events.description: 张国焘在卓木碉另立“中央”，造成党和红军内部严重分裂风险。该节点用于呈现红四方面军路线中的政治分歧。
participants: 红四方面军部分领导人
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Dispute at 四川马尔康卓木碉
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a dispute event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川马尔康卓木碉 (19351005).

events.title: 翻越六盘山并击退追敌
events.description: 中央红军越过六盘山地区，接近陕甘根据地。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Battle at 宁夏六盘山
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a battle event on the Red First Front Army route near 宁夏六盘山 (19351007).

events.title: 中央红军到达吴起镇
events.description: 中央红军到达陕北吴起镇，与陕北根据地接通，中央红军长征胜利结束。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Arrival at 陕西吴起镇
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a arrival event on the Red First Front Army route near 陕西吴起镇 (19351019).

events.title: 陕甘红军迎接中央红军到达吴起镇
events.description: 中央红军到达吴起镇时，西北根据地已由刘志丹、谢子长、习仲勋等长期经营形成，红军主力终于找到落脚点。
events.titleEn: The Shaanxi-Gansu Red Army welcomes the Central Red Army at Wuqi
events.descriptionEn: When the Central Red Army reached Wuqi, the northwestern base—built over years by local revolutionaries—became the landing point of the Long March.

events.title: 吴起镇“切尾巴”战斗击退追敌
events.description: 中央红军到达陕北后，在吴起镇附近击退尾追之敌，巩固落脚陕北的军事态势。
events.titleEn: The Wuqi fighting drives off pursuing forces
events.descriptionEn: After reaching northern Shaanxi, the Central Red Army fought near Wuqi to repel pursuing forces and consolidate its foothold.

events.title: 红十五军团榆林桥战斗
events.description: 红十五军团继续打击敌军，为巩固陕甘根据地和迎接中央红军创造条件。
events.titleEn: Shaan-Gan: Campaign at 陕西甘泉榆林桥
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Shaan-Gan route near 陕西甘泉榆林桥 (19351025).

events.title: 贺捷生出生，随后成为长征路上的婴儿
events.description: 贺龙与蹇先任的女儿贺捷生出生。红二、六军团出发时，她刚出生18天，成为随军长征的婴儿。

location.name: 湖南桑植洪家关/刘家坪一带

events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Birth at 湖南桑植洪家关/刘家坪一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a birth event on the Red Second Front Army route near 湖南桑植洪家关/刘家坪一带 (19351101).

events.title: 红四方面军南下受挫，百丈关战役前后损失严重
events.description: 红四方面军南下后与川军激战，部队遭受重大损失，随后战略处境更加困难。此节点用于解释其后北上与会师的背景。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Campaign at 四川雅安百丈关
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川雅安百丈关 (19351115).

events.title: 红二、六军团从桑植开始长征
events.description: 红二、红六军团主力一万七千多人离开湘鄂川黔苏区，从湖南桑植刘家坪和轿子垭地区出发，开始长征。

location.name: 湖南桑植刘家坪/轿子垭

events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Start at 湖南桑植刘家坪/轿子垭
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a start event on the Red Second Front Army route near 湖南桑植刘家坪/轿子垭 (19351119).

events.title: 贺捷生出生18天后随军踏上长征路
events.description: 红二、六军团出发时，贺龙之女贺捷生出生仅18天，被装在马背上的箩筐里随军前行，成为长征中最小的亲历者之一。

location.name: 湖南桑植刘家坪/洪家关

events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Life at 湖南桑植刘家坪/洪家关
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a life event on the Red Second Front Army route near 湖南桑植刘家坪/洪家关 (19351119).

events.title: 红二、六军团渡过澧水，贺捷生随军前行
events.description: 红二、六军团出发后急行军渡过澧水。出生仅18天的贺捷生由母亲和战友照护随军前行，呈现长征中家庭、生命与战争交织的另一面。
events.titleEn: The Second and Sixth Corps cross the Lishui; infant He Jiesheng travels with the column
events.descriptionEn: Soon after departure, the Second and Sixth Corps crossed the Lishui. He Jiesheng, only eighteen days old, was carried with the column.

events.title: 直罗镇战役
events.description: 中央红军与陕北红军协同作战，粉碎敌军对陕甘根据地的“围剿”，巩固长征落脚点。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Campaign at 陕西富县直罗镇
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red First Front Army route near 陕西富县直罗镇 (19351121).

events.title: 陕北红军参加直罗镇战役
events.description: 陕北红军与中央红军联合作战，长征落脚点由“到达”转入“巩固”。
events.titleEn: Shaan-Gan: Campaign at 陕西富县直罗镇
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Shaan-Gan route near 陕西富县直罗镇 (19351121).

events.title: 瓦窑堡会议提出抗日民族统一战线策略
events.description: 中共中央在瓦窑堡召开政治局会议，分析华北事变后的国内形势，提出建立抗日民族统一战线的策略方针，长征落脚点进一步转化为抗日前进出发点。
events.titleEn: The Wayaobao Meeting advances the anti-Japanese united-front strategy
events.descriptionEn: At Wayaobao, the central leadership analyzed the national situation and advanced the strategy of an anti-Japanese national united front.

events.title: 红二、六军团转战湘鄂川黔边
events.description: 红二、六军团离开根据地后在湘、鄂、川、黔边境机动作战，继续摆脱敌军围堵。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: March at 湘鄂川黔边境
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red Second Front Army route near 湘鄂川黔边境 (19351220).

events.title: 红二、六军团向贵州石阡、镇远、黄平方向转移
events.description: 红二、六军团进入贵州，开展机动作战，为进入乌蒙山区创造条件。

location.name: 贵州石阡/镇远/黄平一带

events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: March at 贵州石阡/镇远/黄平一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red Second Front Army route near 贵州石阡/镇远/黄平一带 (19360115).

events.title: 红二、六军团在毕节开展群众动员
events.description: 红二、六军团转战黔西北期间，在毕节一带宣传抗日、发动群众、建立政权，补充了长征不只是行军作战，也包含政治动员与地方建设的层面。
events.titleEn: The Second and Sixth Corps mobilize local people around Bijie
events.descriptionEn: In northwestern Guizhou, the corps carried out propaganda, mass mobilization and local political work around Bijie.

events.title: 红二、六军团转战毕节并建立地方革命政权
events.description: 红二、六军团在黔西北毕节地区活动，建立地方革命委员会和地方武装，宣传抗日民族统一战线。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Base building at 贵州毕节
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a base building event on the Red Second Front Army route near 贵州毕节 (19360215).

events.title: 国民党军多路围追红二、六军团
events.description: 面对多路敌军尾追侧击，红二、六军团进入乌蒙山区展开回旋机动作战。
events.titleEn: KMT forces: Encirclement at 乌蒙山区周边
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a encirclement event on the KMT forces route near 乌蒙山区周边 (19360220).

events.title: 乌蒙山中部回旋，牵制多路追敌
events.description: 红二、六军团在乌蒙山区反复回旋，利用复杂地形牵制和摆脱敌军重兵。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Campaign at 乌蒙山区
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red Second Front Army route near 乌蒙山区 (19360227).

events.title: 红四方面军在川康边整顿后准备北上
events.description: 南下受挫后，红四方面军在川康边地区整顿、筹粮、恢复力量，随后与红二、六军团会合并重新北上。
events.titleEn: The Fourth Front Army regroups near the Sichuan-Kham border
events.descriptionEn: After setbacks in the southward movement, the Fourth Front Army regrouped around the Sichuan-Kham border before meeting the Second and Sixth Corps and moving north again.

events.title: 乌蒙山回旋战开始
events.description: 红二、六军团在乌蒙山区与优势敌军周旋，以大范围机动摆脱围追堵截，成为红二方面军长征叙事中的关键战役群。

location.name: 云南威信/贵州毕节乌蒙山区

events.titleEn: The Wumeng Mountain maneuver begins
events.descriptionEn: The Second and Sixth Corps maneuvered through the Wumeng Mountains to evade superior enemy forces.

poem.title: 乌蒙山的回旋
poem.text: 乌蒙山区山势磅礴，红军在强敌夹击中辗转机动，把险峻山地化为摆脱围堵的空间。

events.title: 敌军围追红二、六军团于乌蒙山区
events.description: 红二、六军团在乌蒙山区大范围回旋时，敌军依托多路兵力围追堵截，红军以机动作战摆脱重围。
events.titleEn: Enemy forces pursue the Second and Sixth Corps in the Wumeng Mountains
events.descriptionEn: Enemy forces pursued and tried to encircle the Second and Sixth Corps in the Wumeng Mountains, while the Red Army maneuvered out of danger.

events.title: 中央红军东征，推动陕甘根据地向抗日前沿展开
events.description: 中央到达陕北后，红军开展东征等行动，陕北落脚点开始转化为抗日出发点。此为长征后续展开节点。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Base building at 陕北黄河西岸
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a base building event on the Red First Front Army route near 陕北黄河西岸 (19360315).

events.title: 乌蒙山回旋战突破重围
events.description: 红二、六军团在乌蒙山区反复机动，牵制和摆脱敌军，保存部队并继续西进。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Campaign at 滇黔交界乌蒙山
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red Second Front Army route near 滇黔交界乌蒙山 (19360328).

poem.title: 乌蒙山的回旋
poem.text: 乌蒙山区山势磅礴，红军在强敌夹击中辗转机动，把险峻山地化为摆脱围堵的空间。

events.title: 刘志丹在东征战斗中牺牲
events.description: 刘志丹率红二十八军参加东征，1936年4月14日在山西中阳县三交镇战斗中侦察敌情时中弹牺牲，年仅33岁。
events.titleEn: Shaan-Gan: Sacrifice at 山西中阳三交镇
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a sacrifice event on the Shaan-Gan route near 山西中阳三交镇 (19360414).

events.title: 张国焘被迫取消另立“中央”
events.description: 在党中央争取和红四方面军指战员要求下，张国焘被迫取消另立的“中央”，为红二、红四会师和共同北上铺路。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Turning point at 四川甘孜一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a turning point event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川甘孜一带 (19360415).

events.title: 红二、六军团石鼓渡过金沙江
events.description: 红二、六军团从云南石鼓一带渡过金沙江，继续向川西北前进。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: River crossing at 云南丽江石鼓
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a river crossing event on the Red Second Front Army route near 云南丽江石鼓 (19360425).

poem.title: 金沙江的“暖”
poem.text: 在皎平渡一带渡过金沙江后，中央红军甩开追敌，获得战略主动。诗句中的“暖”，指向绝处逢生后的舒展与希望。

events.title: 石鼓渡过金沙江，继续向康区北上
events.description: 红二、六军团在石鼓一带渡过金沙江，摆脱尾追敌军，向康区和甘孜方向推进。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: River crossing at 云南丽江石鼓
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a river crossing event on the Red Second Front Army route near 云南丽江石鼓 (19360425).

poem.title: 另一支队伍的金沙江
poem.text: 金沙江不仅是中央红军的转折河流，也是红二、六军团北上的关键天险。渡江之后，队伍向甘孜会师方向推进。

events.title: 红二、六军团经过藏区并继续北上
events.description: 红二、六军团经过滇川藏交界地区，行军中需要处理民族地区补给、向导与群众关系。此节点用于表现除彝海结盟外，长征中广泛存在的民族地区协调。

location.name: 云南中甸/香格里拉一带

events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Alliance at 云南中甸/香格里拉一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a alliance event on the Red Second Front Army route near 云南中甸/香格里拉一带 (19360505).

events.title: 红二、六军团翻越雪山进入康区
events.description: 红二、六军团在雪山峡谷中继续北上，饥寒、缺氧与敌军追击交织，行军极为艰苦。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Snow mountain crossing at 川滇康边雪山地带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a snow mountain crossing event on the Red Second Front Army route near 川滇康边雪山地带 (19360518).

events.title: 红二、六军团经过康区开展民族工作
events.description: 红二、六军团北上途中进入康区和藏族聚居区，依靠纪律、宣传与协商争取通行和补给，丰富了长征中的民族关系叙事。
events.titleEn: The Second and Sixth Corps conduct ethnic work in the Kham area
events.descriptionEn: While moving north, the corps entered Tibetan-inhabited areas and relied on discipline, negotiation and propaganda to secure passage and supplies.

events.title: 红军西征巩固扩大陕甘宁区域
events.description: 中央红军到达陕北后，通过西征等行动巩固扩大陕甘宁区域，长征落脚点进一步转化为战略基地。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Base building at 陕甘宁边区一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a base building event on the Red First Front Army route near 陕甘宁边区一带 (19360601).

events.title: 红二、六军团与红四方面军甘孜会师
events.description: 红二、六军团与红四方面军在甘孜会师，随后共同谋划北上。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Convergence at 四川甘孜
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red Second Front Army route near 四川甘孜 (19360603).

events.title: 红四方面军与红二、六军团甘孜会师
events.description: 红四方面军在甘孜与红二、六军团会师。该事件作为红四方面军自身路线节点，连线只接红四方面军前一事件。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Convergence at 四川甘孜
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川甘孜 (19360603).

events.title: 甘孜会议明确共同北上
events.description: 红二、红四方面军会师后，在甘孜召开会议，明确北上与中共中央会合的行动方针。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Meeting at 四川甘孜
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a meeting event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川甘孜 (19360703).

events.title: 红二、六军团与红三十二军合编为红二方面军
events.description: 红二、红六军团与红三十二军在甘孜地区合编为红二方面军，贺龙任总指挥，任弼时任政治委员。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Reorganization at 四川甘孜
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a reorganization event on the Red Second Front Army route near 四川甘孜 (19360705).

events.title: 红四方面军从甘孜北上
events.description: 红四方面军与红二方面军从甘孜地区出发，途经阿坝、包座等地，越过雪山草地，向甘南推进。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: March at 四川甘孜北上路段
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 四川甘孜北上路段 (19360710).

events.title: 红二方面军从甘孜北上
events.description: 红二方面军与红四方面军会师后共同北上，进入雪山草地路线。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: March at 四川甘孜北上路段
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red Second Front Army route near 四川甘孜北上路段 (19360710).

events.title: 红四方面军再次经过雪山草地
events.description: 红四方面军北上途中越过雪山草地，部队承受高寒、缺粮与疾病考验。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Hardship at 川西北草地
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a hardship event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 川西北草地 (19360815).

events.title: 红二方面军通过草地抵近甘南
events.description: 红二方面军通过草地，进抵甘南地区，随后开展成徽两康等行动。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Hardship at 川甘交界草地
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a hardship event on the Red Second Front Army route near 川甘交界草地 (19360820).

events.title: 红四方面军向甘南推进，接近会宁方向
events.description: 红四方面军走出川西北后向甘南、陇东南推进，逐步靠近红一方面军接应区域，会师态势开始显现。
events.titleEn: The Fourth Front Army advances toward southern Gansu and Huining
events.descriptionEn: After leaving northwestern Sichuan, the Fourth Front Army advanced toward southern Gansu and the Huining area.

events.title: 红四方面军进入甘南并控制漳县、渭源、通渭等地区
events.description: 红四方面军北上后进入甘肃南部，控制漳县、渭源、通渭等地区，为会宁会师铺开路线。

location.name: 甘肃通渭/渭源/漳县一带

events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Arrival at 甘肃通渭/渭源/漳县一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a arrival event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 甘肃通渭/渭源/漳县一带 (19360910).

events.title: 红二方面军占领成县、徽县、两当、康县等地
events.description: 红二方面军在甘肃南部开展成徽两康行动，扩大活动区域，随后向北转移。

location.name: 甘肃成县/徽县/两当/康县一带

events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Campaign at 甘肃成县/徽县/两当/康县一带
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a campaign event on the Red Second Front Army route near 甘肃成县/徽县/两当/康县一带 (19360915).

events.title: 甘肃东北部敌军试图阻止红军会师
events.description: 三大主力红军接近会师阶段，敌军仍试图在甘肃、宁夏周边阻止红军汇合，但会宁、将台堡会师最终完成。

location.name: 甘肃会宁—宁夏将台堡一线

events.titleEn: Enemy forces attempt to prevent final convergence in northeastern Gansu
events.descriptionEn: As the main Red Army forces approached convergence, enemy forces still tried to prevent them from meeting around Gansu and Ningxia.

events.title: 红二方面军渡渭河北上
events.description: 红二方面军经中央同意放弃甘南地区，开始渡渭河向北转移，奔向会师区域。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: March at 甘肃渭河一线
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a march event on the Red Second Front Army route near 甘肃渭河一线 (19361004).

events.title: 红四方面军与红一方面军会宁会师
events.description: 红四方面军同红一方面军在甘肃会宁会师。这是三大主力会师过程中的关键节点之一。
events.titleEn: Red Fourth Front Army: Convergence at 甘肃会宁
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red Fourth Front Army route near 甘肃会宁 (19361009).

events.title: 红一方面军在会宁迎接红四方面军
events.description: 红一方面军部分兵力控制会宁、界石铺、将台堡等地，接应红四方面军北上会师。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Convergence at 甘肃会宁
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red First Front Army route near 甘肃会宁 (19361009).

events.title: 红一方面军在将台堡迎接红二方面军
events.description: 1936年10月22日，红一、红二方面军在将台堡胜利会师。该节点与10月9日会宁会师共同构成三大主力会师完成的历史过程。
events.titleEn: Red First Front Army: Convergence at 宁夏西吉将台堡
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red First Front Army route near 宁夏西吉将台堡 (19361022).

events.title: 红二方面军到达将台堡，三大主力会师完成
events.description: 红二方面军总指挥部及红二军团到达将台堡，与红一方面军胜利会师。至此，红一、红二、红四方面军三大主力会师完成，红军长征胜利结束。
events.titleEn: Red Second Front Army: Convergence at 宁夏西吉将台堡
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a convergence event on the Red Second Front Army route near 宁夏西吉将台堡 (19361022).

events.title: 陕甘根据地成为长征落脚点与抗战出发点
events.description: 各路红军会师后，陕甘根据地作为落脚点的意义进一步显现，并逐渐成为全民族抗战的重要出发点。
events.titleEn: Shaan-Gan: Victory at 陕甘宁区域
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a victory event on the Shaan-Gan route near 陕甘宁区域 (19361022).

events.title: 四路红军长征汇入陕甘宁，新的出发点形成
events.description: 到1936年10月，几路红军在西北完成战略汇合。长征保存了革命骨干，也使陕甘宁区域成为中国革命新的大本营。
events.titleEn: Shaan-Gan: Victory at 陕甘宁区域
events.descriptionEn: This node marks a victory event on the Shaan-Gan route near 陕甘宁区域 (19361022).

statsModel.note: 动态统计采用史实口径与节点累积结合。
